Explanation: After reviewing the search results, there is no direct evidence identifying a video game series that matches all the provided criteria. The only relevant information is that Bethesda developed "Wayne Gretzky Hockey" [47974], which matches the Olympic Gold Medalist clue. However, none of the search results confirm a Bethesda series (or any other) released between 1990 and 1995 that features mutants, animal power-ups, swords, explosives, was re-released 2015-2020, is set 60+ years in the future, and whose concept was by a Project Lead on a World War 2 game. I agree with the other agents' conclusions due to lack of evidence.
Exact Answer: Insufficient evidence to determine
Confidence: 10%
